guides.note: SP table PDF column extraction failure — course titles and CU/Term values extracted in separate column-order blocks rather than row order. Only 9 of 30 SP titles recoverable. AoS (30 courses, all descriptions, all competencies) is fully intact and usable. Same failure class as BSITM.

guides.degree_title: Master of Arts in Teaching, Social Studies Education (Secondary)

sp_format_split.note: MATELED (Elementary Education) and MATSPED (Special Education) use 3-column SP format (with Term). All 7 secondary subject guides use 2-column (no Term). Both formats are pre-validated and require no parser branching.

matsped_low_case.cause: PDF column extraction failure in the SP table. pdftotext extracted course titles and CU/Term values in column order rather than interleaved row order for this particular PDF. First 3 course titles appear in correct row-interleaved positions; the remaining 27 course titles appear as a contiguous block at the end of the SP section, completely separated from their CU/Term data. Parser found only 9 matchable SP rows.
matsped_low_case.impact: SP data for MATSPED is unusable — 21 reconciliation anomalies, only 9/30 SP rows recovered. AoS content (30 courses, all descriptions, all competency bullets) is fully intact.
matsped_low_case.parser_change: None made. Fixing requires either a PDF re-extraction with different column settings, or a post-hoc batch-title matcher. Both deferred. The anomaly is source-PDF-only; no parser change would help without a better PDF extraction.
matsped_low_case.prior_parallel: BSITM (LOW confidence, SP column extraction failure, AoS clean) — same class of failure.

recommendation.summary: 9/9 parsed, 0 failures, 7 HIGH / 0 MEDIUM / 1 LOW. MATSPED SP data is unusable (PDF extraction failure); AoS is clean. All 7 secondary programs and MATELED parse cleanly. No parser changes required.
recommendation.next_family_rationale: The low-risk education tier (education_ba, education_bs, teaching_mat) is now complete. Next recommended families are cs_grad (5 guides) or accounting_ma (5 guides). Both are graduate families expected to follow the validated graduate_standard / mba 3-col SP pattern. Gate either MSCS or MACC before full rollout.
